ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coach" TEXT /* Name of the assistant coach */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_games" INTEGER /* Number of regular season games */,
  "playoff_games" INTEGER /* Number of playoff games */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win/loss) for the home team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's performance statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "giveaways" INTEGER /* Number of giveaways */,
  "takeaways" INTEGER /* Number of takeaways */,
  "faceoff_win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of faceoffs won */,
  "time_on_ice" REAL /* Average time on ice per game */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Total shots on goal */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game roster */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number worn by the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player in the game */,
  "starting_lineup" INTEGER /* Whether the player was in the starting lineup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_rosters_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's game statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists in the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the game */,
  "giveaways" INTEGER /* Number of giveaways in the game */,
  "takeaways" INTEGER /* Number of takeaways in the game */,
  "faceoff_win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of faceoffs won in the game */,
  "time_on_ice" REAL /* Time on ice in the game */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Penalty minutes in the game */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Shots on goal in the game */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of penalty (e.g. hooking, holding) */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of penalty minutes */,
  "penalty_time" TEXT /* Time the penalty was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g. concussion, knee sprain) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g. Hart Trophy, Vezina Trophy) */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the user has */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_video" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game video */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the game video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_video_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
